arts.ttl: When is Barcelona vs Sevilla? Times, how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: The LaLiga matchday-10 game between Barça and Sevilla will be played at the Olympic Stadium in Montjuic (Barcelona), on Sunday 20 October, 2024. Watch FC Barcelona vs Sevilla on fubo TV

arts.ttl: “They want to destroy us” – Joan Laporta hits out at Barcelona critics
arts.sum: On Saturday, Barcelona hosted their annual General Assembly. Joan Laporta, the club’s president, discussed a variety of topics, one of which was about teams’ reported strained relationship with the Catalan giants. The Negreira case saw numerous clubs take aim at Barcelona, and relations have not improved since. Laporta took a strong approach when discussing the […] The post “They want to destroy us” – Joan Laporta hits out at Barcelona critics appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barcelona tracking 16-year-old South American sensation likened to Erling Haaland
arts.sum: Barcelona are one of many clubs that regularly keeps an eye on the South American market in their search for talented youngsters, and the ongoing South American U15 Championship has allowed them to cast their eye over many options at the same time. For this, one has emerged above the rest: Juan Riquelme Angulo. arts.ttl: Bayern Munich talisman struggling with injury ahead of Champions League showdown against Barcelona
arts.sum: On Wednesday, one of the biggest Champions League matches of the season so far will take place at the Estadi Olimpic. Bayern Munich will make the trip to Catalonia to face high-flying Barcelona, who will be aiming to make it back-to-back victories in the competition. Ahead of the fixture, Barcelona will recover four players: Wojciech […] The post Bayern Munich talisman struggling with injury ahead of Champions League showdown against Barcelona appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Confident Alex Valle bets on himself as Celtic purchase bid to Barcelona 'left off the table'
arts.sum: The 20-year-old has flashed glimpses of his potential and will now to secure regular game time with Taylor on the shelf

arts.ttl: García Pimienta says Sevilla will have to ‘enjoy defending’ vs Barca
arts.sum: Barcelona are unbeaten in their last 21 games against Sevilla at home, a record García Pimienta wants to end this weekend. Sevilla boss Francisco Javier García Pimienta has said his team will have to “enjoy defending” if they are to win at Barcelona ahead of Sunday’s clash between the two teams .

arts.ttl: Barca told why Szczesny was ‘destined’ to play for club
arts.sum: Jacek Rutkowski has told AS that Szczęsny was “destined” to play for Barcelona and has always loved the club. Szczesny has always admired Barcelona since he started playing football.

arts.ttl: Erik on development of Alvaro Fernandez
arts.sum: If you think: 'I have to win every game' and as a team we have to match the standards to win every game, you get there where you have to be because they are the expectations Sir Alex set for this club. “In this moment, we can't match the standards he [Sir Alex] set but still we won trophies.

arts.ttl: Barcelona chief confirms talks to extend contracts of 3 players
arts.sum: Barcelona president Joan Laporta has confirmed that the club are actively working to tie three members of the club’s first-team squad down to new contracts. The trio in question? Pedri,…
